summary: Kimi Antonelli's commanding pole position at Spa sets up a Mercedes power play against Max Verstappen, who qualified second and will chase the rookie sensation on a track where top speed defines victory. Lando Norris storms back from a 10-place penalty to challenge the frontrunners, while Lewis Hamilton's momentum-building win in Spain keeps Ferrari's championship hopes alive despite recent struggles. A strong result here could cement Mercedes' resurgence or hand Verstappen a crucial points haul to tighten the championship fight heading into the season's second half.
